title: 💼 面试：介绍你的简历
intro: An interviewer walks you through your background in Mandarin — an oral CV exam. Answer out loud in full sentences, then compare with the model answer (with pinyin).

say: 你好，请先做个自我介绍。你叫什么名字？
beats.say_en: Please introduce yourself — what's your name?
beats.hint: Say your name and where you're from. (我叫… / 我来自…)
beats.model_en: Hello, my name is ___, I'm from the United States. (nǐ hǎo, wǒ jiào ___, wǒ láizì měiguó)

beats.say_en: What do you do for work now?
beats.hint: Say your job. (我是… / 我做…)
beats.model_en: I'm a ___, mainly responsible for ___. (wǒ shì ___, zhǔyào fùzé ___)

say: 说说你的工作经验吧。你以前在哪里工作？
beats.say_en: Tell me about your experience — where did you work before?
beats.hint: Mention past work. (我以前在…工作)
beats.model: 我以前在 ___ 工作了 ___ 年。
beats.model_en: I worked at ___ for ___ years before. (wǒ yǐqián zài ___ gōngzuò le ___ nián)

beats.hint: Say your major/school. (我学的是… / 我在…上大学)
beats.model_en: I studied ___ at ___ university. (wǒ zài ___ dàxué xué de shì ___)

say: 你觉得你的优点是什么？
beats.say_en: What are your strengths? / Why should we choose you?
beats.hint: Name a strength. (我的优点是… / 我很…)
beats.model: 我的优点是认真、学得快，比如 ___。
beats.model_en: My strengths are being diligent and learning fast, for example ___. (wǒ de yōudiǎn shì rènzhēn, xué de kuài)

say: 最后，你为什么对这个感兴趣？
beats.say_en: Finally, why are you interested? / Future plans?
beats.hint: Give a reason or goal. (因为我想… / 我希望…)
beats.model_en: Because I want to ___, I think I can ___. (yīnwèi wǒ xiǎng ___, wǒ juéde wǒ néng ___)

outro: 你做得很好！ You talked through your whole CV in Mandarin. Repeat it a few times and it'll come out naturally. 💼
